home.title: Vibe Trading
home.subtitle: Professional trading research with AI assistance

features.agentDesc: Natural-language financial research with your personal AI trading analyst
features.backtestDesc: Rigorous strategy testing with realistic slippage and transaction costs
features.streamingDesc: Live market data with streaming updates and alerts
features.replayDesc: Replay and analyze your trading history with full context

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Configure model credentials and market data source tokens for this local project.
settings.apiDesc: For remote or private Web UI deployments, enter the server API key once in this browser. Localhost use can stay blank.
settings.storedHint: Stored only in this browser. Leave blank to clear it.
settings.llmDesc: Choose the model used by the agent and save it to the project-local agent/.env file.
settings.providerHint: Changing providers updates the recommended model and endpoint.
settings.modelHint: Use the exact model id required by your provider.
settings.reasoningHint: How hard the model thinks before answering. Higher is more thorough but slower; leave Off for fastest replies.
settings.dataSourcesDesc: Configure optional market data credentials used by backtests and research agents.
settings.tushareHint: Used for China A-share, futures, fund, and macro data. If unset, the project falls back to AKShare where available.
settings.keepCurrentKey: Leave blank to keep the current key
settings.keepCurrentToken: Leave blank to keep the current token
settings.noApiKeyRequired: This provider does not require an API key.

compare.title: Strategy Comparison
compare.empty: Select two runs to compare their metrics.

runDetail.runMissingDesc: The run directory may have been removed, or your browser may not have API access configured. Check that the API authentication key is set in Settings if accessing remotely.
runDetail.noChartDataDesc: The backtest engine may not have generated price data. Check the artifacts/ directory.

alphaZoo.title: Alpha Zoo
alphaZoo.heroDesc: Browse formula-driven cross-sectional signals from Qlib, the Kakushadze 101 set, GTJA 191, and the academic anomaly literature. Click any alpha to read its formula and source code, or run a bench to score the whole zoo on a universe and period.
alphaZoo.compareTip: Tick 2+ alphas below, then compare them head-to-head
alphaZoo.decayTitle: Predictive half-life: trading days before the signal's edge decays
alphaZoo.noMatch: No alphas match the current filters.
alphaZoo.scoreZoo: Score a zoo on a universe
alphaZoo.scoreDesc: Computes IC / IR for every alpha in the selected zoo over the chosen universe and period, then bucketizes them as alive / reversed / dead.
alphaZoo.compareDesc: Benches just the alphas you pick on a universe and period, then ranks them by IC / IR with the gap to the leader — far faster than benching a whole zoo when you only care about a shortlist.
alphaZoo.idsHint: Separate ids with commas or spaces. Tip: tick alphas in the catalogue and hit "Compare" to prefill this.
alphaZoo.enterAtLeastTwo: Enter at least 2 distinct alpha ids to compare.

agent.evidenceCollected: Evidence collected toward this research goal
agent.typePlaceholder: Describe a trading strategy, research question, or risk-control task...
agent.timeoutHint: Execution timed out. Try simplifying the strategy or reducing the number of assets.
agent.apiHint: API call failed. Please retry later.
agent.welcomeSubtitle: vibe trading with your professional financial agent team
agent.welcomePrompt: Describe a trading strategy to get started.
agent.failedToSend: Failed to send message, please retry.
agent.goalPlaceholder: Describe the research goal to attach to this session
agent.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Create a dual MA crossover strategy for 000001.SZ, backtest 2024

validation.monteDesc: Shuffled trade order {{count}} times to test if Sharpe is better than random.
validation.bootstrapDesc: Resampled daily returns {{count}} times to estimate {{confidence}}% confidence interval.
validation.walkDesc: Split into {{count}} sequential windows to check performance consistency.
